name: Eggs Vindaloo
recipeIngredient: 2 tbsp Vindaloo or hot curry paste
1 tbsp Chopped coriander or mint leaves
recipeInstructions:
Preparation time: 25 minutes
Cooking time: 20 minutes
Serves: 4-6
1. Boil the eggs in water with 1 teaspoon vinegar for 8-9 minutes. Remove to a large dish of cold water, and peel when cool.
2. Prick the eggs evenly all over with a fork and dry well.
3. Heat the ghee or butter in a pan. Add onion, garlic, ginger, and chili. Cook until golden and softened.
4. Add vindaloo or hot curry paste and cook briefly.
5. Stir in coconut cream and 1/3 cup water. Cook until sauce thickens.
6. Heat frying oil in another pan. Deep-fry the eggs until golden on the surface.
7. Transfer to a serving dish. Add coriander and lemon juice to taste. Simmer in the sauce for 8-9 minutes.
8. Serve with rice.
